text:
MD-PPAS data now include variables 
that report the percent of line items performed in urgent care centers and retail clinics. Internal 
analyses revealed that providers affiliated with large retail clinics or urgent care centers listed the 
place of service as “office” as well as “retail clinic” or “urgent care center”. Therefore, to help 
data users more accurately capture the POS for these providers, the data now report service lines 
associated with retail clinics and urgent care centers
